job_summary: A Quality Assurance CRA (GCP Auditor) ensures clinical trials adhere to quality standards and regulatory guidelines through audits and inspections.
key_responsibilities: Conduct internal and external GCP audits
Evaluate trial processes, systems, and documentation
Identify compliance gaps and recommend corrective actions
Prepare audit reports and inspection readiness plans
Ensure adherence to Good Clinical Practice
qualifications: Experience in clinical research and auditing
career_path: QA CRA → Quality Manager → Head of Quality Assurance
skills_required: conduct internal and external gcp audits
evaluate trial processes, systems, and documentation
identify compliance gaps and recommend corrective actions
prepare audit reports and inspection readiness plans
